select_all.example: SELECT id, name, email FROM users

missing_where.rule: SELECT without WHERE clause retrieves all rows
missing_where.example: SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = 'active' LIMIT 100

inefficient_like.rule: LIKE with leading wildcard prevents index usage
inefficient_like.recommendation: Use trailing wildcard or full-text search

function_in_where.rule: Functions in WHERE clause prevent index usage
function_in_where.recommendation: Use functional indexes or computed columns

or_conditions.rule: Multiple OR conditions can be slow
or_conditions.recommendation: Use IN clause for better performance

n_plus_one.rule: N+1 query problem causes excessive database calls
n_plus_one.example: SELECT u.*, p.* FROM users u JOIN posts p ON u.id = p.user_id

missing_index.rule: Frequently queried columns should be indexed
missing_index.recommendation: Create index on columns used in WHERE, JOIN, ORDER BY

unused_index.rule: Unused indexes waste space and slow writes
unused_index.recommendation: Drop indexes that haven't been used in 90 days

duplicate_index.recommendation: Keep only the most specific index

composite_index_order.rule: Column order matters in composite indexes
composite_index_order.recommendation: Put most selective columns first, then order by usage pattern

large_table_no_index.rule: Tables with 100k+ rows should have proper indexes
large_table_no_index.recommendation: Analyze query patterns and create appropriate indexes

missing_timestamps.rule: Tables should have created_at and updated_at
missing_timestamps.recommendation: Add timestamp fields for audit trail

missing_foreign_keys.rule: Relationships should use foreign key constraints
missing_foreign_keys.recommendation: Add foreign key constraints for referential integrity

missing_cascade.rule: Foreign keys should specify ON DELETE behavior
missing_cascade.recommendation: Add ON DELETE CASCADE or ON DELETE SET NULL

nullable_primary_key.rule: Primary keys must not be nullable
nullable_primary_key.recommendation: Add NOT NULL constraint to primary key

excessive_varchar.recommendation: Use appropriate length based on actual data

indexing: Index columns used in WHERE clauses
Index columns used in JOIN conditions
Index columns used in ORDER BY
Consider composite indexes for multi-column queries
Don't over-index: each index slows down writes
queries: Use prepared statements to prevent SQL injection
Use LIMIT for large result sets
Implement proper error handling and rollback
schema: Add NOT NULL constraints where applicable
Use ENUM for fixed set of values

eav.recommendation: Use proper schema design or JSON columns

polymorphic_association.description: One foreign key referencing multiple tables
polymorphic_association.recommendation: Use separate foreign keys or inheritance
